event: Initially evaluated in Obstetric Emergency Department
Moderate fluid in all quadrants on abdominal ultrasound
Septic shock with an abdominal source
New laparostomy with progressive closure technique performed
Surgical revision at four days after first intervention
Abdominal cavity closed without the need of prosthesis
Good fetal viability observed daily during hospital stay
Kept obstetric follow-up of remaining uncomplicated pregnancy
Child remains thriving without neurological or other impairments
